# lastRenderTime | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ PHASE ](/documentation/phase)

- [ PHASEEngine ](/documentation/phase/phaseengine)

- [ lastRenderTime ](/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/lastRenderTime)

- [ PHASEEngine ](/documentation/phase/phaseengine)

-  lastRenderTime 

Instance Property# lastRenderTime

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+

```
var lastRenderTime: AVAudioTime? { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/lastRenderTime#discussion)

Obtain the time for which the engine most recently rendered.

Will return nil if the engine is not running

## [See Also](/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/lastRenderTime#see-also)

### [Controlling and Inspecting Playback State](/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/lastRenderTime#Controlling-and-Inspecting-Playback-State)

[`func pause()`](/documentation/phase/phaseengine/pause())Pauses all audio playback.[`func start() throws`](/documentation/phase/phaseengine/start())Starts or resumes all audio playback.[`func stop()`](/documentation/phase/phaseengine/stop())Stops all audio playback.[`func update()`](/documentation/phase/phaseengine/update())Processes app commands and increments framework processing.[`var renderingState: PHASESoundEvent.RenderingState`](/documentation/phase/phaseengine/renderingstate)The status of the engine’s audio playback.
